channel.title: Cryptography on MonkeMan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cryptography on MonkeMan's Blog

item.title: What is PGP/GPG?
item.description: Info In this post, I provide an example of implementing digital signatures for blog posts. While this method works, I no longer use it due to a switch in my Hugo theme for my website. What is PGP/GPG? To quote Wikipedia, “Pretty Good Privacy (PGP) is an encryption program that provides cryptographic privacy and authentication for data communication.” It is widely used for sending encrypted emails, encrypting sensitive files and digitally signing files.
